text.name: Michelob
text.optInCheckboxText: Check this box to begin your entry into Michelob ULTRA’s Superior Access Sweepstakes for a chance to win exclusive prizes, and to agree that ESPN may share your name and email with Michelob ULTRA for its independent use in accordance with their Privacy Policy. To complete entry, visit here and follow the instructions. You must be 21+. No purchase necessary.

additionalData.betYourBracketSubtitle: Don't miss new promos every day during The Cup!

text.bracketChampionPickPhrase: Congrats! Your Pick To Lift the Trophy Is: <% championPickName %>
text.description: Welcome to Knockout Bracket Challenge: the game that lets you crown your Champion on the Global Game's biggest stage! The Knockout Rd kicks off Sunday, June 28th @ 3p ET - don't get locked out! Create up to 25 brackets for FREE and compete for a chance to win $10,000!
text.descriptionShortLock: Use BracketCast to follow the live scores and track your brackets throughout the Knockout Rd.
text.descriptionShortPreLock: Create up to 25 brackets! FREE to play.
text.groupOpenGraphDescription: You've been invited to join a group and play <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %>
text.groupsOpenGraphDescription: Join a group to compete in <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %> against friends and family for FREE.
text.howToPlayOpenGraphDescription: Check out the How to Play, Prizes, FAQ and Rules of <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %>
text.leaderboardOpenGraphDescription: See how the best are faring in <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %>
text.makePicksOpenGraphDescription: Play <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %> for FREE and make your picks.
text.welcomeScreenHeroSubTextComplete: Win prizes playing ESPN's other free to play games all year long!
text.welcomeScreenHeroSubTextLocked: Use BracketCast to follow the live scores!
text.welcomeScreenHeroSubTextPreLock: Create up to 25 Brackets. FREE to play.
text.noEntriesSubtitleComplete: The tournament has ended. Thank you for your interest in <% challengeName %>.
text.noEntriesSubtitleLander: The Knockout Rd is just around the corner. Get ahead of the game and create a bracket now!
text.noEntriesSubtitleLocked: The Knockout Rd is underway and signups have closed. Check out the live bracket by clicking below.
text.noEntriesSubtitlePreLock: The Knockout Rd field is set. Create up to <% challengeMaxEntries %> brackets today!

tiebreakQuestions.question: How many TOTAL CORNERS will be taken in the Knockout Rounds? (No 3rd Place Match)
